div.style: float: right; display: inline-block; top: -9px; width: 35%;

div.p: The Ransomware Add-on for Splunk collects real-time ransomware data, providing visibility into active threats, victim details, and group activities to strengthen ransomware detection and threat intelligence.
Get the Activation key by clicking here.

To set up Ransomware account to fetch Token, click on the button below and download the manual.
Download

To configure the addon, click on the button below and download the manual.
Download
Csirt: Collects information on ransomware-related CSIRT (Computer Security Incident Response Team) reports and responses.
Group Details: Gathers detailed profiles of active ransomware groups, including aliases and activity summaries.
Listsectors: Lists targeted industry sectors affected by current ransomware campaigns.
Group Iocs: Fetches indicators of compromise (IOCs) linked to ransomware groups for threat correlation.
Negotiation: Captures data on ransom negotiations and communication patterns between attackers and victims.
Press All: Retrieves press releases and public reports about ransomware incidents and group activity.
Ransomnotes: Collects samples and details of ransom notes used in recent attacks.
Ransomstats: Provides statistical insights on ransomware incidents, including group counts and victim trends.
Victim: Gathers details of organizations targeted or compromised by ransomware operations.
Yara: Fetches YARA rules associated with ransomware detection for threat hunting.

p.b: Please feel free to reach out to us in case of any queries at support@avotrix.com.
